description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Marketing product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Audience).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Marketing.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of Oracle Marketing accessible data as well as  unauthorized read access to a subset of Oracle Marketing accessible data and unauthorized ability to cause a partial denial of service (partial DOS) of Oracle Marketing. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 6.3 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L).
